_comment: Featured games for the Model-Native Inference Arcade starter set. Order = display order. The first four preserve the tested showcase row (boulderchase dropped from featured); the next four broaden the no-Java migration sample across puzzle, roaming shooter, digger, and chaser patterns. Aliens (0), Pacman (68), and Frogger (frogs, 44) headline the arcade classics. (No Snake/Snaker game exists in the GVGAI single-player corpus.) Ranks 10-13 are the four best-qualifying candidates from the arcade eval sweep: hungrybirds (50, 8/8 model passes + wins, score 100), camelRace (15, 8/8 passes + wins), crossfire (26, 7/7 passes + wins), and link (63, 6 passes, top scorer of its tier).
